user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood is in survival mode; neighbors are critically depleted and accepting offers. r2c0 has sufficient margin to share meaningfully without jeopardizing its own 10+ hour survival window..
